items.title: Add deterministic collector fixtures and fixture result contract checks
items.rollback: Revert this slice and restore prior generated files/backups if validation fails.
items.evidence: Record changed files, commands, PASS/FAIL output, fixture provenance, blockers, remaining risks, and rollback note.

completed_evidence.summary: Added deterministic collector fixture inputs, raw metadata snapshots, normalized fixture results, and fixture contract checks against shared contract vocabulary.
completed_evidence.validation: pnpm --filter @project/collectors typecheck PASS; pnpm --filter @project/collectors test PASS; validate-planning PASS; validate-dev-flow PASS; pnpm validate:all PASS
completed_evidence.fixture_provenance: WBS-13 fixtures are synthetic clean-room data with reserved fixture.invalid URLs; they contain no marketplace data, secrets, cookies, tokens, credentials, session material, live crawling, browser automation, or external API output.
contract_checks: Fixture inputs/results use contractSchemaVersion from packages/contracts.
Fixture result statuses, markets, and failure reasons are checked against shared contract runtime vocabulary.
Raw metadata snapshots remain separate from normalized FixtureCollectorResult output.
Rate-limited and unsupported-market outcomes are represented as typed PartialFailure fixtures.
risks: Fixtures are examples only; real marketplace crawling remains out of scope.
Future WBS slices must keep fixture domains synthetic and keep session/cookie/token handling disabled.
completed_evidence.rollback: Revert the WBS-13 collector fixture, test, source, and planning evidence changes to restore the pre-WBS-13 state.
